title: 12 Swords Disciples
content:
All Seer
 had his 
Seven Heavenly Fated disciples
, so 
Ling Tianhou
 created his own team of special disciples called 
Da Lou Sword Sect
’s 12 Swords!

The Seven Heavenly Fate disciples had celestial spell inheritances, while the 12 Swords had demonic beast spirits protecting them.

They all have a 
Ling Tianhou
’s sword energy.

Members
[
]

Chen Long
(dragon)

Hai Zhu
(pig)

Wei Yang
(ram)

Zi Shu
(Rat)
